hero.title: British Academic Excellence, From the D.R. Congo.
hero.subtitle: An elite 4-year university pathway. Begin your post-Exetat preparatory year and graduate with a globally recognised British degree — without leaving your country.

journey.title: Your Pathway to the British Bachelor's Degree (BSc/BA Hons)
journey.subtitle: An integrated 4-year programme, designed to transform Congolese state graduates into British higher education degree holders.
journey.subtitle2: From the Examen d'État to a British Bachelor's Degree — A structured, rigorous, fully distance-learning pathway.
journey.year0_desc: The first stage of your journey. This intensive year bridges the Congolese education system with British university standards. You will develop the analytical skills, research methodology and linguistic proficiency required to excel at university.
journey.year1_desc: Official entry into the university cycle. You acquire the theoretical and practical foundations of your specialisation according to UK university standards.
journey.year2_desc: Deepening of knowledge. This year focuses on practical application, critical analysis and the resolution of complex industry case studies.
journey.year3_desc: The final year. You complete your research dissertation or capstone project and are awarded your official Bachelor's (Honours) degree, conferred directly by an accredited British university.

foundation.title: Education Without Borders. Excellence Without Compromise.
foundation.subtitle: Three fundamental pillars that make Ignito Academy the reference institution for British higher education in the D.R. Congo.
foundation.benefit1_desc: Obtain a certified British university degree, opening the doors to companies worldwide and granting access to the most prestigious international careers.
foundation.benefit2_desc: A seamless transition between the Examen d'État and the rigorous standards of Anglo-Saxon higher education. Master the global academic codes.
foundation.benefit3_desc: An integrated 4-year pathway. From your preparatory year through to your Bachelor's degree, benefit from a coherent pedagogy and bespoke academic support.

curriculum.title: Foundation Year Syllabus
curriculum.subtitle: Explore the seven core modules of your first year. A rigorous curriculum designed to elevate your academic competencies to the standards of top UK universities.

pathway_detail.title: The British Degree Delivered to You
pathway_detail.subtitle: Study Intelligently. Save. Earn a British Degree — From the DRC.
pathway_detail.description: Complete all 4 years of your British degree in the DRC through our innovative distance learning model — saving you over $142,000 in tuition, living costs and travel expenses.
pathway_detail.year0_desc: This intensive year bridges the Congolese education system with British university standards. Analytical skills, research methodology and linguistic mastery.
pathway_detail.year1_desc: Official entry into the university cycle. Theoretical and practical foundations of your specialisation to UK university standards.
pathway_detail.year2_desc: Deepening of knowledge. Practical application, critical analysis and resolution of complex industry case studies.
pathway_detail.year3_desc: Research dissertation or capstone project. Award of the accredited British Bachelor's degree.

scholarship.title: The Excellence Scholarship
scholarship.subtitle: Up to 20 full-ride scholarships for our inaugural cohort.
scholarship.description: We cover 100% of your tuition fees and your monthly internet package for all 4 years. Reserved for the brightest minds in the DRC with an average above 70%.
scholarship.criteria_2: Strictly under 20 years of age by September 1st, 2026

why_choose.title: Why Choose Ignito Academy?
why_choose.subtitle: An institution founded on academic rigour, pedagogical excellence and the ambition to elevate the DRC on the world stage.
why_choose.benefit1_desc: Our programme is subject to the most stringent quality assurance requirements in the United Kingdom, guaranteeing an education of excellence and immediate global recognition.
why_choose.benefit2_desc: A state-of-the-art asynchronous learning platform. Study at your own pace with unlimited access to academic resources, lectures and digital libraries.
why_choose.benefit3_desc: Benefit from individual academic support from a highly qualified faculty, fully dedicated to your academic success and professional development.
why_choose.benefit4_desc: Your British degree is recognised worldwide. Open the doors to the most demanding careers, without geographical boundaries.

final_cta.title: Your British Bachelor's Degree Begins Here.
final_cta.subtitle: Applications for the September 2026 cohort are officially open. Submit your application before 31 July 2026 to secure your place.

footer.description: The reference institution for British distance higher education in the D.R. Congo.
footer.address: Kwango Avenue, Building 130B, 5th floor, Central Station, Gombe
